findings.title: [未校验属主的资源查询] 金额未校验非负/上限
findings.description:
amount 参数直接使用，未校验负数或上限。

攻击场景: POST /create?amount=-100 套利

exploitability.prerequisites: 构造负数 amount 参数

impact.worstCase: 余额无限增加，资金直接损失

snippet.code: public class OrderController { public Order getOrder(Long id) { return repo.findById(id); } public void create(double amount) { Order o = new Order(); o.setAmount(amount); } public void ship(Long id) { Order o = repo.findById(id); o.setStatus("SHIPPED"); } public String pay(Long id) { return paymentService.charge(id); } public List search(String kw) { String sql = "SELECT * FROM o WHERE n LIKE %" + kw + "%"; return db.query(sql); } }

findings.fullContext: public class OrderController { public Order getOrder(Long id) { return repo.findById(id); } public void create(double amount) { Order o = new Order(); o.setAmount(amount); } public void ship(Long id) { Order o = repo.findById(id); o.setStatus("SHIPPED"); } public String pay(Long id) { return paymentService.charge(id); } public List search(String kw) { String sql = "SELECT * FROM o WHERE n LIKE %" + kw + "%"; return db.query(sql); } }
findings.reviewerNote: [LLM 自主挖掘，置信度高直通]

findings.title: [0-day 候选] business_logic 变种: 变种1：source 改为 JSON body 字段
findings.description:
基于 F-2026-000001（[未校验属主的资源查询] 金额未校验非负/上限）外推的语义变种。
推理: 
新 source: http.body.data
新 sink: JSON.parse → 动态字段访问

snippet.code: public class OrderController { public Order getOrder(Long id) { return repo.findById(id); } public void create(double amount) { Order o = new Order(); o.setAmount(amount); } public void ship(Long id) { Order o = repo.findById(id); o.setStatus("SHIPPED"); } public String pay(Long id) { return paymentService.charge(id); } public List search(String kw) { String sql = "SELECT * FROM o WHERE n LIKE %" + kw + "%"; return db.query(sql); } }

findings.title: [0-day 候选] business_logic 变种: 变种2：绕过 WAF 的编码变体
findings.description:
基于 F-2026-000001（[未校验属主的资源查询] 金额未校验非负/上限）外推的语义变种。
推理: 
新 source: http.header.X-Forwarded-For
新 sink: 原始接口

snippet.code: public class OrderController { public Order getOrder(Long id) { return repo.findById(id); } public void create(double amount) { Order o = new Order(); o.setAmount(amount); } public void ship(Long id) { Order o = repo.findById(id); o.setStatus("SHIPPED"); } public String pay(Long id) { return paymentService.charge(id); } public List search(String kw) { String sql = "SELECT * FROM o WHERE n LIKE %" + kw + "%"; return db.query(sql); } }
